rationale: Composition g o f is defined pointwise by (g o f)(a) := g(f(a)) for functions f, g (def:function). def:cartesian-product-rel is removed: it underlies function-as-relation but is carried transitively by def:function, so it is redundant here -- the pointwise definition does not invoke the product directly.
notes: Over-inclusion removal. If the corpus convention is to surface the relational substrate explicitly on every function operation, the reviewer may restore it; but by the load-bearing/ambient rule it is redundant given def:function.
